parameters:
Light a bonfire? (You can save and return at the
bonfire.)

You need a torch to light a bonfire (Make one at the
workbench.)

There's a mysterious magic circle... Touch it?
(＊H-scene will start)

Upon touching the magic circle, everything before my
eyes turned pure white...!

An announcement can be heard from nowhere...
Congratulations on defeating the Yokai Butt Wall!!
Sigh... I had such a rough time... Why is it always me

We can move forward now! Alright, let's go! (Sage
Mode)

Give it to me, fairy?? "Give it to me, give it to me,
your life... give it to me!"
Give it to me, demon "Aww, I lost... here, take this"
Received 2 Revival Potions and 3 Medium Potions
